text.title: pricing-research Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for pricing-research as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Passing a single scraped pricing page snapshot to an analyzer agent and treating it as current.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Competitor pricing is A/B tested per visitor and changes frequently. Always pass freshly-scraped HTML; stale data misprices the product.

failure-mode.description: Adding a "Custom / Enterprise" tier to the public pricing page without any enterprise customers.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: It signals unachieved scale. Enterprise prospects see it and call; you have no process for them. Add this tier when you have actual enterprise sales motion.
